guide: [36m[System] Use the elevator to move to different areas.[0m
[36m[System] Progress is only saved when traveling between areas via elevator.[0m
[36m[System] With some exceptions, areas may be reset or altered upon leaving.[0m
[36m[System] If you find the current floor too challenging, return to the Safe Zone to save.[0m
